desc:
These dungeon rooms seem all the same.  There are signs of recent battling
everywhere.

exits.desc: There is a shimmering light.

name: The Dungeon

desc:
You feel safe within the blue glow of the moongate.  The dungeon creatures
seem to be afraid of it.

exits.desc: There seems to be a beach.

name: The Dungeon Moongate

desc:
The moongate has led to the oceanside city of Minoc.  To the north, there is
the sea and to the south there is the town of Minoc.
name: Minoc

desc:
The Armorer buys and sells armor.  His smithy is impressive with all of his
greatest works hanging on the walls.
name: The Armorer

desc:
This is the entrance of Minoc.  To the east you see the weaponsmith, and to
the west is the Armorer.  To the south there seems to be a large road.
name: Minoc's Fountain

desc:
The best Weaponsmith in the realm is here.  His shop is full of hanging
weapons.
name: The Weaponsmith

desc:
This is the shop where you can purchase vehicles to cross the sea.  There
isn't much choice though.
name: The Boatseller

desc:
This Street goes from east to west.  To the west is a shop and to the south
is a home.
name: Sacrifice Street

desc:
This Street runs from east to west.  To the west there is a shop, and to
there east there is a forge.
name: Sacrifice Street

desc:
This Street runs from west to east.  There is a home to the south and forge
to the east.
name: Sacrifice Street

desc:
The heat of the place cause blisters to form.  The rhythmic beat of hammer
against the forge causes you to believe that someone is working here.
name: Forge

desc:
This residence is very small.  It befits the teaching of sacrifice without
any item that is extra.
name: Residence

desc:
This residence is very small.  It befits the teaching of sacrifice without
any item that is extra.
name: Residence

desc:
This beach ends here.  You can enter the ocean through the calm lagoon to the
west.
name: The Beach

desc:
The beach extends from west to east but the waves are too heavy here to enter
the ocean.
name: The Beach

desc:
The beach here is perfect, glistening white sands, perfect sun.  Too bad
there is a monster infestation....
name: The Beach

desc:
The Beach seems so idyllic.  It's too bad that these monsters keep showing
up.
name: The Beach

desc:
The Beach ends here.  It's impossible to enter the ocean from here.  You'll
have to turn back.
name: The Beach

desc: This is a nasty whirlpool.  Huge waves threaten to crush everything in sight.

exits.desc: A swampy lagoon.

name: The Whirlpool

desc: This is a nasty whirlpool.  Huge waves threaten to crush everything in sight.
name: The Whirlpool

desc: This is a nasty whirlpool.  Huge waves threaten to crush everything in sight.
name: The Whirlpool

desc: This is a nasty whirlpool.  Huge waves threaten to crush everything in sight.
name: The Whirlpool

desc: This is a nasty whirlpool.  Huge waves threaten to crush everything in sight.
name: The Whirlpool

desc: This is a nasty whirlpool.  Huge waves threaten to crush everything in sight.
name: The Whirlpool

desc: This is a nasty whirlpool.  Huge waves threaten to crush everything in sight.

exits.desc: There is a shimmering light to the north.

name: The Whirlpool

desc: This is a nasty whirlpool.  Huge waves threaten to crush everything in sight.
name: The Whirlpool

desc: This is a nasty whirlpool.  Huge waves threaten to crush everything in sight.
name: The Whirlpool

desc:
The sea waves lap up against the Moongate.  The blue reflection disappears
into the ripples.

exits.desc: Through the moongate you see a large campfire.

name: The Minoc Moongate

desc:
This campfire sits in the middle of the camp.  Many of the paladins stand by
it looking it the desert beyond.  Some just wander by.  To the south is a small
tent, to the north are more tents.
name: A Campfire

desc:
There is a grand tent to the south.  The tent flap entrance can be seen to
the east.
name: Between the Tents

desc:
To the south, there is a huge tent.  To the east lies a smaller, more
ordinary, tent.
name: In Front of the Grand Tent

desc:
The paladin's tent is very Spartan, as he has to live without much in order
to develop his Honor.
name: A Small Tent

desc:
The paladin's tent is very Spartan, as he has to live without much in order
to develop his Honor.
name: A Small Tent

desc:
There is a HUGE stack of treasure here.  It is truly immense.  It would make
you easily a millionaire.  If you could even take a tenth of it, you could buy
your levels.  But the treasure is surrounded by a shield.  A shield that only
the truly Honorable could get through.  And if you were truly honorable you
wouldn't take the treasure.
name: The Treasure Tent

desc:
This tent is absolutely huge.  To the east is the map room.  To the south
there is Dupre.  To the east is the treasure room.
name: The Grand Tent

desc:
This room has many maps and scrolls all over the table.  There is one in
particular that interest you.

extra_descs.desc:
The scroll reads as follows:

Dear Lord British,
     This is Dupre reporting about the paladin expedition.  We
are in the process of clearing the desert of those annoying
sandtraps.  Unfortunately one of my men had wandered into the
dragon cave and was slayed by that evil creature.  We need
another knight, and also he had a moonstone.  Thank you, my
liege.
                         Your Servant,
                         Dupre

The map has a rough drawing of the camp and to the north a small segment of
the desert, and a drawing of a winged lizard near the very north.

name: The Map Tent

desc:
This is the commander's tent.  It is full of commander type things.  It's
simple, as befits a paladin.
name: Dupre's Tent

desc:
The paladin's tent is very Spartan, as he has to live without much in order
to develop his Honor.
name: A Small Tent

desc:
You feel the hot desert wind blow sand into your face as you look at those
dunes.
name: Desert Entrance

desc:
The paladin's tent is very Spartan, as he has to live without much in order
to develop his Honor.
name: A Small Tent

desc:
The desert in the northeast part of Britannia is a perfect example of its
kind.  Dry, ugly, and lots of sand.

exits.desc: There is a shimmering light.

name: The Desert

desc:
The Desert is an ugly place.  Sand whips into your eyes, making you unsure of
where you are and what you see.
name: The Desert

desc:
You trudge on.  This desert seems endless.  You'd even welcome a mirage, to
break up the monotony.
name: The Desert

desc:
Your thirst seems to slacken as you see the comforting glow of the moongate.
You'll soon be out of this desert.

exits.desc: Through the moongate you seem to see a shrine.

name: The Desert Moongate

desc:
Your thirst seems to slacken as you see the comforting glow of the moongate.
You'll soon be out of this desert.

exits.desc: There is just blue.

name: The Desert Moongate

desc:
There is a large cave to the north.  Smoke pours out of it at regular
intervals.

exits.desc: The smoke obscures all vision.

name: The Desert

desc:
The sands blows into your ears and eyes and scours your skin.  You may not
have much skin left by the time you get out of here.

exits.desc: There is a shimmering light.

name: The Desert

desc:
Your thirst seems to slacken as you see the comforting glow of the moongate.
You'll soon be out of this desert.

exits.desc: There is just blue.

name: The Desert Moongate

desc:
The cave is smoky.  There is a glint of gold.  The smell of sulfur fills the
air, choking you.
name: The Dragon Cave

desc:
In this room a huge ankh sits on a pedestal.  The Shrine is the source of all
magical power.  The Timelord himself lives here.  There is a moongate here also.
And last of all there is a huge engraving taking up the west wall.

exits.desc:
You peer into the blackness, and hear shrieks and sounds totally
inhuman.

Peace infuses your body.  The graveyard is a solemn and sobering
place.
Through the moongate you see a castle.

extra_descs.desc:
@n
Pilgrim,
     You have reached the final step on your way to enlightenment.
In this last step you will be shown ultimate evil to your north,
and ultimate good to your south.  This is the land of the undead.

   The dead of both those whose goodness links them to the land,
and those whose evilness was rejected are here.  To have true
spirituality one must know both.  Once you have been strengthened
and forge through the evil, there is one final test before you
prove yourself equal to the Avatar himself.  You must endure
the test of time.

Through your entire journey you have not understood the real symbol of the
ankh.  Its true beauty only reveals itself to you now.  This knowledge
transcends all that came before.

name: The Shrine of Spirituality

desc:
The ground itself seems malevolent.  It seems to suck at you as it tries to
engulf you.
name: The Place of Ultimate Evil

desc:
The air sickens you.  You choke on whatever flows through the air as you gasp
for oxygen.
name: The Place of Ultimate Evil

desc:
It is dark, there is no evidence of light except what you have with you.
And this is swallowed by the darkness within 2 feet.
name: The Place of Ultimate Evil

desc:
Sounds are very weird in this place.  Some sounds, like shrieks and
blood-curdling shouts, are amplified, and you hear them frequently.  Others,
like your own voice, will not travel to beyond a inch from your face.
name: The Place of Ultimate Evil

desc:
When you enter this place all of your senses are immediately blasted.  You
breathe in that total evilness and feel dirty.  You want to leave right now.
name: The Place of Ultimate Evil

desc:
You feel invisible things all over your body, sucking and poking at you,
hurting you.
name: The Place of Ultimate Evil

desc:
The graveyard background noises seem to soothe you.  They are light and
peaceful.  Your own voices carries so well and softly that you seem to be
telepathically communicating.
name: The Graveyard

desc:
When you walk into here you are immediately soothed.  Nothing could be wrong
with the world.  All your senses are pleased.

exits.desc: There is a shimmering light.

name: The Graveyard

desc: You feel a light breath of air under your clothing.  It gently massages you.
name: The Graveyard

desc:
The ground itself here seems to welcome your footsteps.  It is springy and
causes you little fatigue.
name: The Graveyard

desc:
The scent of the air refreshes you.  It is sweet and lovely.  Flowers on the
graves release their perfumes into the air.
name: The Graveyard

desc:
The light here is bright and lovely.  It shines on the gravestones as if
laying a benediction on the dead.
name: The Graveyard

desc:
This building is awe-inspiring.  Lord British's personal Jester is here to
entertain you.

exits.desc: You see a fountain.

name: Lord British's Castle Entrance

desc:
A lovely fountain sits here.  Light sparkles the water droplets, making them
look like diamonds.  To the north you see a guard.
name: Castle Fountain

desc:
There is a magical staircase going up.  Beware, for those who go up shall not
return down.  The other exits except for the west are closed for construction.

exits.desc: You see the altars of enlightenment.

name: A Staircase

desc:
This is the entrance for Lord British.  Through the great doors to the north
you can enter.  Another hallways passes across this one.
name: Hallway

desc:
This is a hallway that would regularly extend from west to east, but it is
closed for reconstruction.  There is though a room to your north that can be
entered.
name: Hallway

desc:
In the Throne Room there are the two most important figures in the world; the
avatar and Lord British himself.
name: The Throne Room

desc:
Batlin, molester of animals and general jerk, lives here.  The room looks
peaceful but, like its occupant, probably hides evil.
name: Batlin's Room

desc:
You may gain true enlightenment here.  There is a large plaque on the wall.
The path continues only if you use the mantra, to gain enlightenment.

exits.desc: The Path Of Enlightenment leads on.

extra_descs.desc:
Honesty is the scrupulous respect for truth-the willingness never to deceive
oneself or another.

name: The Altar of Honesty

desc:
You may gain true enlightenment here.  There is a large plaque on the wall.
The path continues only if you use the mantra, to gain enlightenment.

exits.desc: The Path Of Enlightenment leads on.

extra_descs.desc:
Compassion is nonjudgmental empathy for one's fellow creatures.  It is pure
love.

name: The Altar of Compassion

desc:
You may gain true enlightenment here.  There is a large plaque on the wall.
The path continues only if you use the mantra, to gain enlightenment.

exits.desc: The Path Of Enlightenment leads on.

extra_descs.desc: Valor is the courage to take actions in support of one's convictions.

name: The Altar of Valor

desc:
You may gain true enlightenment here.  There is a large plaque on the wall.
The path continues only if you use the mantra, to gain enlightenment.

exits.desc: The Path Of Enlightenment leads on.

extra_descs.desc: Justice is devotion to truth, tempered by love.

name: The Altar of Justice

desc:
You may gain true enlightenment here.  There is a large plaque on the wall.
The path continues only if you use the mantra, to gain enlightenment.

exits.desc: The Path Of Enlightenment leads on.

extra_descs.desc: Sacrifice is the courage to give of oneself in the name of love.

name: The Altar of Sacrifice

desc:
You may gain true enlightenment here.  There is a large plaque on the wall.
The path continues only if you use the mantra, to gain enlightenment.

exits.desc: The Path Of Enlightenment leads on.

extra_descs.desc: Honor is the courage to stand for truth, against any odds.

name: The Altar of Honor

desc:
You may gain true enlightenment here.  There is a large plaque on the wall.
The path continues only if you use the mantra, to gain enlightenment.

exits.desc: The Path Of Enlightenment leads on.

extra_descs.desc:
Spirituality is the concern with one's inner being and how one deals with
truth, love, and courage.

name: The Altar of Spirituality

desc:
You may gain true enlightenment here.  There is a large plaque on the wall.
The path continues only if you use the mantra, to gain enlightenment.

exits.desc: The Path Of Enlightenment ends there.

extra_descs.desc:
Humility is perceiving one's place in the world, not according to one's own
accomplishments, but according to the intrinsic value of all individuals.

name: The Altar of Humility

desc:
A voice booms out, "You are now eight parts enlightened.  To truly become an
Avatar though you must experience what he has experienced.  Go through the time
warp and fight his enemies.  Beware!  Only High Mortals should attempt this
challenge."

exits.desc: The Time Warp leads you to another place.

name: The Enlightenment

desc:
This is a forest.  You were sent very far back in time.  Before there was a
Britannia.  Almost before there was a Lord British.  This is the time of
Mondain.  The first enemy that the Avatar met.
name: In the Warp

desc:
You are in a featureless room.  You see the apprentice and lover of Mondain
here.  Minax.  She does not seem happy to see you.

exits.desc: The Time Warp zips to the future.

name: In the Warp

desc:
You see the last of the Triad of Evil.  With its destruction came the
breaking of the world.

exits.desc: The Time Warp continues on.

name: In the Warp

desc:
A voice booms out, "You have now truly became Enlightened.  You have fought
and defeated the Avatar's enemies of the past.  Now the time warp leads to the
future.  Only the truly courageous can survive the enemies there."

exits.desc: The Time Warp changes space, and fluxes its surroundings.

name: The Enlightenment

desc:
You seem to be in a castle.  But there are torture devices here, and an angry
King.

exits.desc: The Time Warp sputters and crackles.

name: In the Warp

desc:
You seem to be in a blue room.  It seems to be only 2 dimensional as it
sparkles.  There is also a big red face here.

exits.desc: All looks peaceful beyond the moongate.

name: In the Warp

desc:
The whirlpool-like ocean is to the north, and the beach is back to the east.
The beach looks much safer.

exits.desc: The Ocean Roars.
The beach sparkles.

name: The Lagoon

desc:
The blue moongate casts a strange blue light upon a huge gate to the south.
The gate is open and beyond it you see a simple village.  Around the gate there
are two pedestals.  On the first pedestal is a magic scroll.  On the second is a
plaque.

exits.desc: There is a huge gate.

extra_descs.desc:
An image flies out of the scroll and creates a huge image of a face
approximately ten feet off the ground.  It says, "Welcome to Ultima, where
adventure and excitement may be found for all people, and all levels.  Each of
the separate planes increase in level.  Have a nice day!"
The plaque reads, "The Ultima Area was originally made for Merc 2.0."

name: Entrance to Ultima
